title: Oregon Association of Disability Employees (OrADE) — Constitution & By-Laws
description: Constitution and by-laws of the Oregon Association of Disability Employees (OrADE), an affiliate of NADE (Pacific Region). The constitution covers name, purpose, qualification/classes of members (Full, Retired, Honorary), officers/executive board (President, President-elect, Secretary, Treasurer, Historian), meetings, and amendments; the by-laws detail accomplishment of purpose, quorum, officer duties, executive board, meetings, elections, and parliamentary authority. Marked 'Revised 4/8/2004'.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Oregon (OrADE) Chapter
source.title: Oregon Association of Disability Employees Constitution & By-Laws

notes: Authoritative: this is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source document Oregon-const-Bylaws.doc. Note the chapter names itself the Oregon Association of Disability EMPLOYEES (not 'Examiners') in the document body — title reflects the content, not the filename. Both the constitution and by-laws carry 'Revised 4/8/2004' (8 April 2004), captured as temporal_coverage. Some list numbering/indentation is mangled by the conversion. Related to the NADE regional constitutions/bylaws link index.
